title: fritillaria enginiana
intro: Fritillaria enginiana, also known as the Chinese gold-thread or yellow fritillaria, is a type of flowering plant in the lily family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating respiratory infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas. In modern times, fritillaria enginiana is also being researched for its potential in treating conditions such as bronchitis and pneumonia.
